positive: A minimalist, stylized graphic illustration of a majestic, mythical forest creature (like a glowing stag or a whimsical owl) surrounded by abstract, geometric floral patterns. The style is highly clean, vector-art inspired, using thick, crisp outlines and solid color blocks with negative space emphasis. The composition is centered and symmetrical, suitable for a repeat pattern or a single centerpiece on apparel. Limited color palette: deep sapphire blue, burnt orange, forest green, and creamy off-white. Dramatic, flat lighting to enhance silhouettes and contrast. High detail, 8k, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blurry, artifact, watermark, signature, text, low quality, poorly drawn, distorted, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, grain, jpeg artifacts, gradient, realistic photography, photorealism
